expertise.story1: Founded in Marseille, IO Software is a consulting firm and software publisher focused on strategy, organisation, processes, data and AI. Our consultants combine field experience and academic expertise to deliver concrete and lasting solutions.
expertise.story2: We operate in France and internationally, working with SMEs and large companies alike, with the same commitment to quality and impact.
